prompt: Write a useDebounced React hook that takes a value and returns a debounced version. Useful for search inputs where we don't want to fire on every keystroke.

ground_truth.title: API shape: returns single value, not [value, isPending]
ground_truth.description: User can't tell if a debounced update is pending. Common alternative is a tuple.

ground_truth.title: Initial debounced value equals immediate value
ground_truth.description: First render is not debounced. Could be undefined until first delay elapses.

ground_truth.title: Trailing edge only — no leading edge fire
ground_truth.description: Update lands after the timeout; no immediate fire on first input.

ground_truth.title: No max-wait / no flush
ground_truth.description: If value changes continuously forever, debounced never updates.

ground_truth.title: delay parameter in dependency array
ground_truth.description: Changing delay mid-flight resets the timer rather than rescaling it.

ground_truth.title: Cleanup via clearTimeout on unmount and on every value change
ground_truth.description: Correct behavior, but is a deliberate choice.

ground_truth.title: setTimeout-based, not requestAnimationFrame
ground_truth.description: rAF is an alternative for animation-tied debouncing.

ground_truth.title: No SSR consideration
ground_truth.description: useEffect runs client-only; SSR would need useLayoutEffect or guard.

ground_truth.title: Generic over T
ground_truth.description: Works for any value type. Could have been narrowed to string.

ground_truth.title: Named function export, not default
ground_truth.description: Module convention not specified by the prompt.
